programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Sinal De Fogo Preto - T02E64
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica enfurecido ao saber que Sai o atacou para testá-lo. Tsunade, Jiraiya, Yamatoe e Shizune se reunem no quarto de Kakashi. Jiraiya expõe o comportamento despreocupado de Naruto. Sai recebe um envelope misterioso do setor operacional da fundação. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Presa Na Escuridão - T02E65
programme.desc: 2008. A nova equipe Kakashi segue em direção à ponte Tenchi. Quando Sai mostra seu desprezo por Sasuke, o antagonismo com Naruto aumenta. Yamato decide que eles passarão a noite em uma pousada para tentar melhorar as relações entre os membros de sua equipe. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Almas Ressuscitadas - T02E66
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura vê Sai trabalhando em uma pintura abstrata e encontra um livro de desenhos incomum no meio das coisas dele. Enquanto vão em direção à ponte Tenchi, eles se mantêm atentos contra qualquer emboscada. Yamato orienta sua equipe caso uma luta aconteça. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden - T02E67
programme.desc: 2008. Yamato faz uma simulação para avaliar as habilidades e técnicas de luta da equipe Kakashi. Sai abandona Naruto para concluir a missão simulada. Naruto fica uma fera e declara que, se é para ajudar a salvar o Sasuke, ele ficará na mesma equipe que Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Momento De Despertar - T02E68
programme.desc: 2008. O dia para capturar o espião finalmente chega. Yamato assume a aparência de Sasori e espera que o espião apareça. Para a surpresa de todos, o espião era Kabuto. De repente, Orochimaru aparece. A situação muda, e a equipe Kakashi se encontra em risco. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Desespero - T02E69
programme.desc: 2008. Ao enfrentar Orochimaru, Naruto liberta o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Quando Yamato vê a quarta cauda, lembra do que Jiraiya falou. Yamato deveria suprimir o chakra que afetaria o corpo de Naruto. O ninjutsu secreto de Yamato se torna aparente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Ressonância - T02E70
programme.desc: 2008. Quando a terceira cauda aparece, Naruto só consegue ver Orochimaru. Ele está cego até para seus companheiros de equipe. Sakura é atingida e cai inconsciente. Sai finalmente segue para sua missão secreta. Naruto libera a quarta cauda proibida. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Meu Amigo - T02E71
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde a consciência e é tomado por impulsos destrutivos. Os clones de Sai e Yamato testemunham uma batalha horrível entre Orochimaru e Naruto. O poder e a aparência de Naruto se tornam demoníacos, como se ele estivesse se transformando na Raposa. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Ameaça Se Aproxima - T02E72
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto, mesmo transformado, não desiste de trazer Sasuke para casa. Sakura é ferida por Naruto, mas consegue usar seu ninjutsu para conter a agitação da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Orochimaru tenta deixar o campo de batalha, mas é confrontado por Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Invasão Da Akatsuki - T02E73
programme.desc: 2008. Orochimaru aceita levar Sai para o esconderijo. Yamato consegue parar a agitação de Naruto, mas os ferimentos de Naruto são graves. Quando ele volta a si, Yamato revela a ele e Sakura que Sai foi embora e que Danzo pode estar conspirando algo terrível. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sob O Céu Estrelado - T02E74
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e sakura ficam chocados quando descobrem que Danzo planeja trabalhar com Orochimaru. A equipe Dakashi é forçada a fazer uma pausa. Orochimaru percebe que está sendo seguido pelo clone de Yamato e decide usar Sai para despistar seus perseguidores. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Oração Do Velho Monge - T02E75
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica chocado ao saber que foi o responsável pelos ferimentos de Sakura. Yamato diz que ele irá suprimir o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas com seu ninjutsu. Sakura pergunta sobre uma história estranha que ela viu no livro de desenhos de Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Próximo Passo - T02E76
programme.desc: 2008. Sai estremece quando encontra Sasuke no esconderijo de Orochimaru. Sai ficará com Orochimaru em troca de algumas informações valiosas, mas ficará sob prisão domiciliar até que possa ser de confiança. Quando fica sozinho, sai e começa a procurar um livro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Escalada De Prata - T02E77
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi consegue achar Sai. Eles começam a interrogá-lo sobre os planos de Danzo, e Sai conta tudo. Sakura descobre, através das atitudes de Sai, alguns pontos fortes em seu subconsciente e assinala para Sai as contradições em seu comportamento. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Julgamento - T02E78
programme.desc: 2008. Kabuto faz um ataque de surpresa na equipe Kakashi para levar Sai de volta. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Un Grito Interrompido - T02E79

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Últimas Palavras - T02E80

programme.desc: Returning to her home planet Pandora, an infamous bounty hunter forms an unexpected alliance with a ragtag team of misfits. Together, they battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to uncover one of Pandoras most explosive secrets. Starring Cate Blanchett, Kevin Hart, Jack Black.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Martians take delight in incinerating humans in director Tim Burtons sendup of 1950s sci-fi classics. Starring Jack Nicholson, Glenn Close, Annette Bening.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Dee Dee makes Gypsy play dress-up for a costume convention, where they each attract charming men who could complicate their insular relationship; Gypsy is starting to question the lies her mother tells her -- especially abut how old she really is.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy is getting older and Dee Dee is forced to new legal maneuvers to keep control of her "little girl," but Dee Dee is limited by her health problems; Gypsy goes to greater lengths than ever to connect with men and experience a sexual awakening.

programme.title: The Pillars of the Earth
programme.desc: Waleran and Regan engineer the prisoner exchange so that they remain on the winning side of the war; Tom wants Jack and Alfred to be friends, but their rivalry over their work lives and Aliena is too intense.

programme.title: The Pillars of the Earth
programme.desc: Richard returns from war to find no money to support his knighthood. Aliena has to choose between her love for Jack and her oath to her father. Waleran uses a disaster at Kingsbridge against Prior Philip.

programme.title: The Pillars of the Earth
programme.desc: As a result of his journeys, Jack has learned how to build a cathedral filled with light. Waleran offers Philip a new position. Kingsbridge becomes prosperous again which infuriates William, who plans an attack.

programme.title: The Pillars of the Earth
programme.desc: Jack has become fixated with the cathedral, while Alienas fixation with the Earldom has married her to Alfred, whom she hates. Waleran and Alfred develop a plot to get rid of Jack for good.

programme.title: Real Time
programme.desc: A killer gives a gambler an hour to live. Starring Randy Quaid, Jay Baruchel, Ella Chan.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A young artist with the ability to draw detailed pictures from memory may be the key to solving a case surrounding the suspicious death of his abusive father.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and Will investigate a distressing call for help deep below the Bermuda Triangle resulting in a deadly battle to save Magnuss life.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: Ever After: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: Treated as a servant by her stepmother (Anjelica Huston), a 16th-century woman (Drew Barrymore) wins the heart of the French prince (Dougray Scott). Starring Drew Barrymore, Anjelica Huston, Dougray Scott.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husbands former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: Snowtime!
programme.desc: Children (Angela Gallupo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball) in a small village learn valuable life lessons when they form two teams for a massive snowball fight. Starring Angela Galuppo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball.

programme.title: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A teen awakes within a massive maze with other teens, with no memory of his past other than dreams about an organization known as WCKD. He hopes to escape by piecing together fragments of his past and clues he discovers in the labyrinth. Starring Dylan OBrien, Kaya Scodelario, Aml Ameen.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials
programme.desc: Thomas and his fellow teenage Gladers battle the powerful organization WCKD while facing the perils of the Scorch, a desolate landscape filled with dangerous obstacles and crawling with the virus-infected Cranks. Starring Dylan OBrien, Kaya Scodelario, Giancarlo Esposito.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Starring Dylan OBrien, Thomas Brodie-Sangster, Kaya Scodelario.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: Though struggling with the ramifications of his extraordinary origin and abilities, young Clark Kent (Henry Cavill) must become a hero and save those he loves from a dire threat. Starring Henry Cavill, Amy Adams, Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
programme.desc: Convinced that Superman (Henry Cavill) is now a threat to humanity, Batman (Ben Affleck) embarks on a personal vendetta to end his reign on Earth, while the conniving Lex Luthor (Jesse Eisenberg) launches his own crusade against the Man of Steel. Starring Ben Affleck, Henry Cavill, Amy Adams.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy and Nick scheme to meet in person and hope to win Dee Dees approval, but when their plan goes disastrously wrong theyll be pushed to make an extreme choice in order to be together.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: While Gypsy and Nick are on the run, flashbacks to a much younger Dee Dee reveal how trauma with her own mother set her up for conflict with Gypsy.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an old college friend, Will finds himself caught in an underground fight club.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and the Sanctuary team attempt to capture a rare and deadly creature while under the watchful eye of a local news crew.

programme.title: Rebelle

programme.desc: A marine biologist (Harry Connick Jr.), a prosthetics designer (Morgan Freeman) and a boy band together to save the life of a dolphin whose tail was severely damaged in a trap. Starring Harry Connick, Ashley Judd, Nathan Gamble.

programme.desc: Retired Rockys (Sylvester Stallone) plan to re-enter the ring for a few small matches escalates into a full-fledged bout with the worlds reigning heavyweight. Starring Sylvester Stallone, Burt Young, Antonio Tarver.

programme.desc: A sailor (Jack Oakie) and his buddy need a singers (Ann Sheridan) allure to win a gunnery-contest bet in Honolulu. Starring Ann Sheridan, Jack Oakie, Martha Raye.

programme.desc: A jazz quartet befriends a poor violinist (Betty Compson), and she puts them in the money as their manager. Starring Betty Compson, John Harron, Ned Sparks.

programme.title: Gladiator (2000)
programme.desc: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

programme.title: Yours, Mine and Ours (1968)
programme.desc: A widow (Lucille Ball) with eight children meets, courts and weds a widowed Navy officer (Henry Fonda) with a brood of 10.

programme.title: Paths of Glory (1957)
programme.desc: A World War I French colonel (Kirk Douglas) defends three soldiers picked to be shot for a generals blunder.

programme.title: The Tin Star (1957)
programme.desc: A cynical former sheriff turned bounty hunter, helps a young, recently appointed acting sheriff with his advice, his experience and his gun.

programme.title: The Quiet Man (1952)
programme.desc: An Irish-born boxer returns to his homeland to reclaim his familys farm and begins a turbulent romance with a beautiful spitfire.

programme.title: Theres Something Wrong With the Children (2023)
programme.sub-title: Theres Something Wrong With the Children (2023)
programme.desc: Margaret and Ben take a weekend trip with two longtime friends and their two young children. Ben soon suspects something sinister is afoot when the kids start behaving strangely after disappearing into the woods overnight.

programme.title: Thief (1981)
programme.desc: A safecracker (James Caan) runs into trouble with the mob when he wants to quit after one last heist.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn (1989)
programme.desc: Power figures want a Caribbean police chief (Denzel Washington) to find his friend Maubee (Robert Townsend), their scapegoat for a murder.

programme.title: Shaft (2000)
programme.desc: A detective (Samuel L. Jackson) and a narcotics cop (Vanessa L. Williams) track a sociopath out to kill a woman who can testify that he committed murder.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk (2003)
programme.desc: A martial-arts master (Chow Yun-Fat) finds an unlikely protege (Seann William Scott) to take over the responsibility of protecting an ancient scroll.

programme.title: 48 HRS. (1983)
programme.desc: A rumpled detective gets a slick convict released into his custody for two days to help him find a murderer in San Francisco.

programme.title: Get Shorty (1995)
programme.desc: A film-loving loan shark (John Travolta) teams with a B-movie producer (Gene Hackman) to become a Hollywood mogul.

programme.title: Be Cool (2005)
programme.desc: Chili Palmer (John Travolta) runs afoul of music-industry players when he teams up with a friends widow (Uma Thurman) to produce a singers debut album.

programme.title: Running Scared (1986)
programme.desc: Two cool Chicago undercover officers (Gregory Hines, Billy Crystal) try to put a drug lord (Jimmy Smits) permanently out of business.

programme.title: Showgirls (1995)
programme.desc: A dancer (Elizabeth Berkley) becomes understudy in a Las Vegas show, sleeps with the boss (Kyle MacLachlan) and pushes the star (Gina Gershon) down a flight of stairs.

programme.title: This is Christmas (2022)
programme.desc: Following Adam and Emma on their daily commute from the village of Langton to London, where they meet the same passengers every day.

programme.title: Indiscreet (1958)
programme.desc: A U.S. diplomat (Cary Grant) in London pretends to be married while having an affair with a famous actress (Ingrid Bergman).

programme.title: All Dogs Go to Heaven (1989)
programme.desc: A junkyard dog returns to Earth from heaven thanks to the powers of a magical, rewindable watch, though his objective changes as he watches events unfold in his former stomping grounds.

programme.title: K2 (1992)
programme.desc: A playboy Seattle lawyer (Michael Biehn) and a family-man professor (Matt Craven) join an expedition climbing the Himalayan peak.

programme.title: The Pink Panther (1963)
programme.desc: Clumsy Inspector Jacques Clouseau (Peter Sellers) chases a jewel thief (David Niven) and his nephew (Robert Wagner).

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The magical hot tub sends Lou (Rob Corddry), Nick (Craig Robinson) and Jacob (Clark Duke) to the year 2025 to prevent an unknown assailant from shooting Lou.

programme.title: Kate and Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: The Naked Gun (2025)
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: American Classic

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: The Foreigner (2017)
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Supercop (1992)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong policeman (Jackie Chan) and a mainland policewoman (Michelle Yeaoh) meet, team up and join a drug ring to destroy it.

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: A law-school grad uncovers a sinister secret about the Tennessee firm that made him an offer he couldnt refuse.

programme.title: Sexorcist (2018)
programme.desc: Something possesses a beautiful women to act wild and crazy.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin (2005)
programme.desc: When his world spirals out of control, a drug dealer wants to leave his violent life behind and pursue his dream of becoming a rap artist. He channels the same manic intensity to his writing as he does to dealing.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A police-state scapegoat (Arnold Schwarzenegger) must play a TV hosts (Richard Dawson) deadly game show for the 21st-century masses.

programme.title: Georgetown (2019)
programme.desc: An eccentric and smooth-talking social climber who seems to have everyone in Washington, D.C., wrapped around his finger is investigated after his wealthy, well-connected and much older wife turns up dead in their home.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Persona (2024)
programme.desc: Two injured women find themselves trapped inside a secluded home with no memory of how they got there. Scared, confused, and distrustful of each other, they must figure out a way to escape before their captor comes back for them.

programme.title: Chuck (2016)
programme.desc: Liquor salesman and part-time prizefighter Chuck Wepner gets the chance to take on Muhammad Ali in a highly publicized title fight, launching him to sudden fame.

programme.title: Warrior (2011)
programme.desc: An Iraq War veteran (Tom Hardy) finds himself on a collision course with his estranged brother (Joel Edgerton) when both set their sights on winning a tournament in mixed martial arts.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Road to Perdition (2002)
programme.desc: When his wife and youngest child are murdered by a jealous gangster, a mob hitman and his surviving son go on the run seeking revenge from those who have done them wrong.

programme.title: Frank Millers Sin City (2005)
programme.desc: Lawmen, prostitutes (Devon Aoki, Alexis Bledel), a hulking thug and other sordid characters run amok in a crime-ridden metropolis.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Tommy (Thom Mathews) meets masked-killer Jason, brought back by a lightning bolt at the lake.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray (2014)
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facilitys longtime detainees.

programme.title: The Banshees of Inisherin (2022)
programme.desc: On a remote Irish island, Pádraic is devastated when his buddy, Colm, suddenly puts an end to their lifelong friendship. With help from his sister and a troubled islander, Pádraic sets out to repair the damaged relationship by any means necessary.

programme.title: Harlem Nights (1989)
programme.desc: Business partners resisting a white mobster trying to take over their nightclub in the 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Deadlock (2021)
programme.desc: A retired Army ranger must save thousands of innocent lives when a rogue team of mercenaries brutally seizes an energy plant and holds everyone inside hostage.

programme.title: Switchback (1997)
programme.desc: A college student (Jared Leto) and a former rail worker (Danny Glover) are suspects in an FBI agents (Dennis Quaid) hunt for a serial killer who abducted his son.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: The Banshees of Inisherin (2022)
programme.desc: On a remote Irish island, Pádraic is devastated when his buddy, Colm, suddenly puts an end to their lifelong friendship. With help from his sister and a troubled islander, Pádraic sets out to repair the damaged relationship by any means necessary.

programme.title: Barrons Cove (2024)
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his sons death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, hes left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: The Last Gunfight (2025)
programme.desc: As the worlds top assassins fight to the death in a ruthless underground tournament, a rogue crew has its own deadly agenda: survive the carnage, outplay the killers and take down the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: Hard Home (2024)
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her daughter, a woman turns her high-tech home into a trap for the killer, initiating a deadly game of cat and mouse where every move can be fatal.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: Killer gorillas menace an ex-CIA agent (Laura Linney), a primatologist (Dylan Walsh) and others on a mission in Africa.

programme.title: Seaside (2018)
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: Supercop (1992)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong policeman (Jackie Chan) and a mainland policewoman (Michelle Yeaoh) meet, team up and join a drug ring to destroy it.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Kindred (2025)
programme.desc: A pair of twisted, young criminals decide to break into a mansion for one big score, but they soon find out that the owners of the house are much more dangerous than they are.

programme.title: The Yards (2000)
programme.desc: A friends lure of easy money draws an ex-con into the corrupt world of his uncles subway-train business.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)
programme.desc: Telling fortunes to support herself and her daughter, a psychic widow (Cate Blanchett) assists the police in a missing persons case.

programme.title: Lift (2022)
programme.desc: A remarkable ballet program enables homeless children to discover the magic of self-expression through dance.

programme.title: Whitney (2018)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Kevin Macdonald examines the life and career of singer Whitney Houston. Features never-before-seen archival footage, exclusive recordings, rare performances and interviews with the people who knew her best.

programme.title: Whitney: Can I Be Me (2017)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Nick Broomfield goes in search of the forces that made and then destroyed singer Whitney Houston, who has been described as having one of the greatest voices of the last 50 years.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye (1996)
programme.desc: A slain girls mother (Sally Field) considers vigilantism after police and the courts botch the case against the killer (Kiefer Sutherland).

programme.title: The Stepford Wives (2004)
programme.desc: A man and his wife move to a quaint suburb where most of the women seem to have the same bland personality.

programme.title: Shes All That (1999)
programme.desc: A cool teen (Freddie Prinze Jr.) bets a friend that he can transform the schools geekiest girl (Rachael Leigh Cook) into a prom queen.

programme.title: What If (2013)
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)
programme.desc: A rich teen asks an unpopular student to the senior prom, creating problems among their separate circles of friends.

programme.title: The Intervention (2016)
programme.desc: A weekend getaway for four couples takes a sharp turn when one of the couples discovers the entire trip was orchestrated to host an intervention on their marriage.

programme.title: Forces of Nature (1999)
programme.desc: A bridegroom (Ben Affleck) hurries by plane to his wedding, but he and his seatmate (Sandra Bullock) must find other modes of travel.

programme.title: Dreamland (2019)
programme.desc: A teen bounty hunter is torn between helping or capturing a seductive fugitive bank robber hiding in his small town during the Great Depression.

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Rachel, who is devastated by her divorce, spends her commute fantasizing about the couple that lives in a house that her train passes. One morning, she sees something shocking and becomes entangled in a missing persons investigation.

programme.title: Emma (1996)
programme.desc: Things keep getting worse after a young matchmaker (Gwyneth Paltrow) finds a mate for a simple young woman (Toni Collette) in rural 1800s England.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Bounce (2000)
programme.desc: An ad executive (Ben Affleck) seeks out the widow (Gwyneth Paltrow) of a stranger who swapped tickets with him before boarding an ill-fated flight.

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.title: The Intervention (2016)
programme.desc: A weekend getaway for four couples takes a sharp turn when one of the couples discovers the entire trip was orchestrated to host an intervention on their marriage.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: The Prince and Me (2004)
programme.desc: Paige, a premedical student, falls in love with Eddie, a Danish prince, who keeps his identity a secret.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance (2001)
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mothers death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.

programme.title: The Stand-In (2020)
programme.desc: A stand-in takes over an actresss career and identity after performing her community service for tax evasion.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road (2008)
programme.desc: In the 1950s Connecticut, two suburbanites become increasingly dissatisfied with their marriage and societys expectations of conformity.

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.
